info.description: REST API for programmatic configuration management of Bitfocus Companion.
info.title: Bitfocus Companion REST API

get.description: Returns all connections with their current status. Use query parameters to include config and secrets.

parameters.description: Include connection secrets in response (requires include_config=true)
parameters.name: include_secrets

schema.description: Include connection secrets in response (requires include_config=true)

collectionId.description: Connection collection id, or null when not in a collection.

enabled.description: Whether the connection is enabled and allowed to run.

label.description: Display name shown for the connection in Companion.

moduleId.description: Connection module id, such as "bmd-atem" or "obs-websocket".

moduleVersionId.description: Module version id used by this connection, such as "1.2.0". Null means the newest compatible stable version is selected automatically, and may be returned while that version is being installed.

sortOrder.description: Sort position of the connection in the Companion UI.

status.description: Latest runtime status reported by the connection.

category.description: Status category reported by the connection module.

level.description: Severity level of the current connection status.

message.description: Human-readable status message from the connection module.

updatePolicy.description: Module version update policy for this connection.

limit.description: Maximum number of resources returned by this response.

offset.description: Number of resources skipped before this response.

details.description: Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.

post.description: Create a new connection instance for a given connection module id. If the module is not installed, Companion queues installation of the latest compatible stable version by default.

disabled.description: Whether the new connection should be created disabled.

label.description: Display name for the new connection.

moduleId.description: Connection module id to create, such as "bmd-atem" or "obs-websocket".

updatePolicy.description: Module version update policy for the new connection.

versionId.description: Specific module version to use. Omit or use null to use the newest compatible stable version. If the module is not installed, Companion queues installation of that version.

details.description: Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.

delete.description: Delete a connection and all its associated configuration.

parameters.description: Connection instance id, as returned by the list or create connection endpoints.
parameters.name: connectionId

schema.description: Connection instance id, as returned by the list or create connection endpoints.

details.description: Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.

get.description: Returns a single connection by ID with its configuration and current status.

parameters.description: Connection instance id, as returned by the list or create connection endpoints.
parameters.name: connectionId

schema.description: Connection instance id, as returned by the list or create connection endpoints.

collectionId.description: Connection collection id, or null when not in a collection.

enabled.description: Whether the connection is enabled and allowed to run.

label.description: Display name shown for the connection in Companion.

moduleId.description: Connection module id, such as "bmd-atem" or "obs-websocket".

moduleVersionId.description: Module version id used by this connection, such as "1.2.0". Null means the newest compatible stable version is selected automatically, and may be returned while that version is being installed.

sortOrder.description: Sort position of the connection in the Companion UI.

status.description: Latest runtime status reported by the connection.

category.description: Status category reported by the connection module.

level.description: Severity level of the current connection status.

message.description: Human-readable status message from the connection module.

updatePolicy.description: Module version update policy for this connection.

details.description: Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.

patch.description: Partially update a connection. Only send the fields you want to change.

parameters.description: Connection instance id, as returned by the list or create connection endpoints.
parameters.name: connectionId

schema.description: Connection instance id, as returned by the list or create connection endpoints.

collectionId.description: Collection id to move the connection into, or null to remove it.

config.description: Non-secret config values to merge into the connection config.

disabled.description: Set true to disable the connection, or false to enable it.

label.description: New display name for the connection.

secrets.description: Secret config values to merge into the connection secrets.

updatePolicy.description: Module version update policy to apply.

versionId.description: Specific module version to use, such as "1.2.0". Omit to leave the current version unchanged. Use null to switch to the newest compatible stable version.

collectionId.description: Connection collection id, or null when not in a collection.

enabled.description: Whether the connection is enabled and allowed to run.

label.description: Display name shown for the connection in Companion.

moduleId.description: Connection module id, such as "bmd-atem" or "obs-websocket".

moduleVersionId.description: Module version id used by this connection, such as "1.2.0". Null means the newest compatible stable version is selected automatically, and may be returned while that version is being installed.

sortOrder.description: Sort position of the connection in the Companion UI.

status.description: Latest runtime status reported by the connection.

category.description: Status category reported by the connection module.

level.description: Severity level of the current connection status.

message.description: Human-readable status message from the connection module.

updatePolicy.description: Module version update policy for this connection.

details.description: Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.

get.description: Returns the config field definitions for a connection module, including field types, constraints, and available options. The connection must be running.

parameters.description: Connection instance id, as returned by the list or create connection endpoints.
parameters.name: connectionId

schema.description: Connection instance id, as returned by the list or create connection endpoints.

data.label: Framerate for fades
data.tooltip: Higher is smoother, but has higher impact on system performance

allowCustom.description: Whether custom values outside the choices list are allowed.

id.description: Choice value sent in connection config.

default.description: Default value for the config field.

description.description: Longer help text for the config field.

enableAlpha.description: Whether color values include an alpha channel.

id.description: Config field id used as the key in config or secrets objects.

label.description: Display label for the config field.

maxSelection.description: Maximum number of choices that can be selected.

minSelection.description: Minimum number of choices that must be selected.

multiline.description: Whether the text field supports multiple lines.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown for empty text fields.

range.description: Whether the field accepts a numeric range.

regex.description: Regular expression that string values must match.

returnType.description: Value type returned by the field.

tooltip.description: Short help text shown for the config field.

details.description: Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.

post.description: Force-restart the connection process. Fails if the connection is disabled.

parameters.description: Connection instance id, as returned by the list or create connection endpoints.
parameters.name: connectionId

schema.description: Connection instance id, as returned by the list or create connection endpoints.

id.description: Connection instance id that was restarted.

message.description: Confirmation message for the restart request.

details.description: Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.
Additional structured details about the error.
